channel.title: Creative Journey on cringe.live
channel.description: Recent content in Creative Journey on cringe.live

item.title: You have to get this right!
item.description: I got really good at making portraits of subjects, I have a completely different frustration now, though‥ There is a big event in the small city I live in currently and as I’m cooped up in my two bedroom apartment alone, generating AI art for a contest I shouldn’t even be participating in normally. But someone told me a month ago that I’m not normal, so with the help of many doctors who treat every situation like a depression, I’m now on a ride to find the correct vocabulary to describe a cybernetically enhanced mushroom in the background.
